title: Best AI Tools for Video Editing in 2026

tools.name: Runway ML
tools.description: Industry-leading AI video editor with green screen, motion tracking, and generative fill.

tools.name: Descript
tools.description: Edit video by editing text. AI removes filler words, clones voices, and generates captions.

tools.name: Pictory
tools.description: Automatically extracts highlights from long-form content and formats them for TikTok/Reels.

faq.question: What is the best free AI video editor?
faq.answer: CapCut and DaVinci Resolve offer robust free tiers with AI features like auto-captions and background removal.

faq.question: Can AI edit videos automatically?
faq.answer: Yes. Tools like Pictory and OpusClip use AI to detect highlights, remove silences, and reframe videos for social media.

faq.question: Is AI video editing worth it for beginners?
faq.answer: Absolutely. AI reduces the learning curve by automating complex tasks like color grading, audio sync, and captioning.

title: Best AI Tools for Writing Blog Posts in 2026

tools.name: Jasper AI
tools.description: Enterprise-grade AI writer with SEO optimization, brand voice training, and 50+ templates.

tools.name: Surfer SEO
tools.description: Combines AI writing with real-time SEO scoring to rank higher on Google.

tools.name: Writesonic
tools.description: Affordable AI writer with blog post templates, fact-checking, and WordPress integration.

faq.question: Can AI write blog posts that rank on Google?
faq.answer: Yes, when combined with human editing and SEO tools like Surfer SEO, AI-generated posts can rank competitively.

faq.question: How much does AI blog writing cost?
faq.answer: Plans range from $10-$100/mo depending on word count, features, and team seats.

faq.question: Is AI-generated content penalized by Google?
faq.answer: No. Google evaluates content quality, not how it's created. Focus on helpful, accurate, and well-structured posts.
